candidates.title: AI labs shift from model demos to enterprise workflow agents
candidates.factualSummary: A leading AI vendor framed its latest product update around task orchestration, tool use, and enterprise controls rather than raw benchmark gains.
candidates.editorialRationale: Tests whether agentic AI monetizes through workflow ownership instead of model novelty.

candidates.factualSummary: A semiconductor supplier highlighted strong accelerator demand while customers continued optimizing deployment cost per token.
candidates.editorialRationale: Connects hardware scarcity to pricing power, margins, and model-serving architecture decisions.
